name: quantum-x-builder
initializeCommand: bash -lc 'cd ${localWorkspaceFolder} && mkdir -p backend/_state && if [ ! -f backend/.env ]; then if [ -f backend/.env.example ]; then cp backend/.env.example backend/.env; else : > backend/.env; fi; fi'
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/quantum-x-builder/backend; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund; fi'
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/quantum-x-builder; mkdir -p backend/_state _OPS/_LOGS; if [ -f backend/package.json ]; then (cd backend && (npm run dev 2>&1 | tee -a /workspaces/quantum-x-builder/_OPS/_LOGS/backend-dev.log)) & disown || true; fi; sleep 1; true'
